project.name: Skate Park Sitecore AI
project.type: Sitecore XM Cloud + Next.js App Router

tech_stack.styling: Vanilla CSS Overrides for Sitecore Forms
tech_stack.validation: React Hook Form + Zod (for React) | Vanilla JS (for Sitecore Forms)

patterns: Bridge Pattern: Using global window store to connect generic CMS forms with React app state
Capture-phase event interception for form submission hijacking
gotchas: BasicForm from Sitecore handles onSubmit internally, requiring Capture-phase listener or e.stopPropagation to override.
Zustand stores used by external JS must be attached to the window object.
Naming conventions for Sitecore Forms are critical for JS-based logic routing (CheckoutShippingAddressForm vs CheckoutBillingAddressFrom).
